items.title: Grok Build agentic coding CLI now available for SuperGrok subscribers
items.summary: xAI’s agentic coding CLI running directly from your terminal. Install with curl. Brings agentic coding workflows, web search, code execution, 1M token context, headless CI/CD into the terminal. Competitor to Claude Code and Cursor.
items.relevance: Critical - this is the exact Grok Build tool powering cos TUI development, surgical edits, data layer writes, and the Grok X-Brief integration itself. Enables model-agnostic personal OS workflows outside any single chat.

items.title: Multi-modal parallel agent orchestration + self-assembling context = personal operating systems are here
items.summary: multi-modal parallel agent orchestration + self assembling context bundles + A2UI = personal operating systems are here. Context of advanced real-time collaborative AI models enabling mind-blowing personal AI.
items.relevance: Critical - direct articulation of the cos vision: personal OS built around agent orchestration, memory/context management, TUI as primary interface (A2UI), stable data contracts for agents (Grok + Hermes).

items.title: RunoGraph: Local-first Textual TUI for coding agent observability and session monitoring
items.summary: Python + Textual + Rich + SQLite local TUI dashboard. Monitors Claude Code sessions in a clean table view; drill-down shows model, tools called, file paths touched. 100% local data, MIT license, for agent observability.
items.relevance: High - concrete example of Textual TUI as reactive mission-control dashboard over agent activity and data (SQLite/JSON contracts). Mirrors cos dashboard tiles, BriefScreen, Knowledge Work views, and future agent memory / learning pipeline visualization.

items.title: Moon Traveler Terminal: Textual TUI with local LLMs and SQLite memory for agentic procedural worlds
items.summary: Full open source Python Textual TUI for local AI agents / text adventures. Uses local LLMs, SQLite for persistent memory/state, procedural generation (Enceladus). Architecture discussion for v0.6+.
items.relevance: High - demonstrates practical Textual TUI + persistent local memory layer (exact match for cos/memory/ and learning-pipeline/intake-queue patterns). Shows LLM tooling and agent state in terminal, relevant to Grok/Hermes + TUI hybrid personal OS.

items.title: AIRecon: Self-hosted LLM + Docker sandbox + Textual TUI for fully autonomous agentic pentesting
items.summary: Autonomous cybersecurity agent using Ollama (local LLM), Kali Linux Docker sandbox, and Textual TUI with real-time feed. Agentic architecture automates full recon-to-exploitation pipeline with no cloud/API keys.
items.relevance: High - Textual TUI as the control surface and real-time dashboard for powerful local autonomous agents. Parallels cos as personal OS mission control for agentic workflows, tool use, memory, and data contracts; inspires secure/local-first design.
